channel.title: IBD LitMonitor - Drug Safety & Pharmacovigilance
channel.description: IBD literature monitoring: Drug Safety & Pharmacovigilance

item.title: Efficacy and Safety of Ravagalimab in Patients with Moderate-to-Severe Ulcerative Colitis: Data from a Phase 2a Trial.
item.description: Advances in therapy - The monoclonal antibody ravagalimab is a potent antagonist to cluster of differentiation 40 (CD40), which is elevated in inflammatory diseases such as ulcerative colitis (UC). This phase 2a, open-l...

item.title: Evaluation of the effectiveness and safety of anti-CGRP monoclonal antibodies in patients with migraine and autoimmune diseases: IMMUNO-CGRP study.
item.description: Headache - This study aimed to evaluate demographic characteristics, treatment effectiveness, and safety outcomes in patients with migraine undergoing anti-calcitonin gene-related peptide (CGRP) treatments re...
